notes:
Initial release of Quill

- Snippet text expansion with trigger matching
- Variable system (text, date/time, clipboard)
- System tray with pause/resume
- Custom titlebar
- Theme selector (system/light/dark)
- Close to tray option
- Keyboard hook for real-time expansion
- Emoji starter pack
- Debounced search in snippets
- Custom scrollbar styling
- Auto-updater support
